seoTitle: Lennard Brook vs Leonora — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lennard Brook and Leonora. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lennard Brook vs Leonora: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lennard Brook and Leonora.
heading: Lennard Brook vs Leonora — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lennard Brook, Western Australia and Leonora, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Leonora has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Lennard Brook (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lennard Brook or Leonora safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lennard Brook has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Leonora scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lennard Brook scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Leonora scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lennard Brook or Leonora?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Leonora has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
